name: Warehouse Modeling Decision Map
summary: Warehouse Modeling Decision Map gives data / analytics work a clearer decision structure.
whenToUseIt: Use this when the team needs a stronger way to reason about warehouse modeling decision map without adding unnecessary complexity.
steps: Map the signal and constraints that matter most.
Choose the smallest next move that improves the system.
Review the output and tighten the loop.
example: A team applies Warehouse Modeling Decision Map to sort noise from signal and decide which change should happen first.
